scripts.setup: bun install && uv sync --directory apps/vision-service && bun run build
scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/shared build && bun run --cwd apps/desktop build
scripts.test: bun test apps/desktop/tests/main && uv run --directory apps/vision-service pytest
scripts.check: bunx biome check . && bun test apps/desktop/tests/main && uv run --directory apps/vision-service ruff check . && uv run --directory apps/vision-service ty check
scripts.test:report:open: bun run test:report && bun run report:open
